# Ai Labs

> Ai Labs is an AI company based in El Salvador that helps companies adapt, develop, and learn with AI.

## What we do

Ai Labs works through three pillars:

- **Academy** — Practical AI teaching through consultancies, workshops, bootcamps, and programs.
- **Agentic** — Software, workflows, and automation built with AI.
- **Aperture** — Community and partner programs that connect people, companies, and relevant opportunities.

Community supports all three pillars. The offer is practical and grounded in real work — not AI as magic, and not guaranteed third-party outcomes.

## Location

El Salvador. Open beyond.

## Primary URLs

- English home: https://ailabs.sv/en
- Spanish home: https://ailabs.sv/es
- Website: https://ailabs.sv

## Contact

Use the contact form on the home page: https://ailabs.sv/en#contact (English) or https://ailabs.sv/es#contact (Spanish).
